summaryAm: አንድ ትንሽ እረኛ ቀልድ ሲያበዛ ጓደኞቹ መተማመን እንደሚቸገር የሚማርበት ለልጆች የተለሳለሰ ታሪክ።

source.name: Aesop's Fables
source.notes: Public-domain source inspiration only. This is an original child-friendly Amharic adaptation with softened scary elements.

pages.textAm: በአረንጓዴ ኮረብታ ላይ አንድ ትንሽ እረኛ በጎቹን ይጠብቅ ነበር። በጎቹ በሰላም ሣር ይበሉ ነበር።
pages.textEn: On a green hill, a young shepherd watched sheep grazing peacefully.
pages.illustrationPrompt: A young shepherd watching sheep on a sunny green hillside, peaceful and safe.

pages.textAm: አንድ ቀን ልጁ ብቻውን ተሰማው። “ጓደኞቼ ቢመጡ ደስ ይለኛል” ብሎ አሰበ።
pages.textEn: One day, the child felt lonely and wished his friends would come.
pages.illustrationPrompt: The young shepherd sitting thoughtfully beside calm sheep on a hillside.

pages.textAm: ከዚያ “ተኩላ መጣ!” ብሎ ጮኸ። ከመንደሩ ሰዎች በፍጥነት መጡ፣ ግን ተኩላ አልነበረም።
pages.textEn: Then he called, Wolf is coming! People came quickly, but there was no wolf.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Kind villagers arriving on a sunny hill while the sheep remain safe.

pages.textAm: ልጁ ትንሽ ሳቀ። ሰዎቹ ግን “እባክህ እውነት ሲሆን ብቻ ጥራን” ብለው በርኅራኄ ነገሩት።
pages.textEn: The child laughed a little, but the people kindly asked him to call only when it was true.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Villagers kindly speaking with the child about telling the truth.

pages.textAm: በሌላ ቀን ልጁ እንደገና ተጫወተ። “ተኩላ መጣ!” ብሎ ጮኸ። ሰዎቹ መጡ፣ ግን ደግሞ ተኩላ አልነበረም።
pages.textEn: Another day, the child called again as a joke, and again there was no wolf.
pages.illustrationPrompt: The child calling from the hillside while villagers look concerned but gentle.

pages.textAm: ከጥቂት ቀናት በኋላ በጫካ ጫፍ አንድ ተኩላ ታየ። ተኩላው ሩቅ ነበር፣ በጎቹም ከልጁ አጠገብ ነበሩ።
pages.textEn: A few days later, a wolf appeared far away near the forest edge.
pages.illustrationPrompt: A distant wolf at the forest edge, very small and non-scary, with sheep safe nearby.

pages.textAm: ልጁ “እባካችሁ እርዱኝ፣ ይህ ጊዜ እውነት ነው!” ብሎ ጮኸ። ሰዎቹ ትንሽ ዘገዩ፣ ምክንያቱም ቀድሞ ቀልድ ነበር።
pages.textEn: The child called for real help, but the people paused because the earlier calls were jokes.
pages.illustrationPrompt: The child calling sincerely while villagers listen from a safe distance.

pages.textAm: ሰዎቹ መጡና በጎቹን በሰላም ወደ ቤት አመጡ። ልጁም “እውነት መናገር መተማመንን ይገነባል” ብሎ ተማረ።
pages.textEn: The people came and brought the sheep home safely. The child learned that truth builds trust.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Villagers, the child, and sheep walking home safely in warm evening light.
